title: Overlap-aware validation with single-count tail scoring (maximal context)
author: nehowell
novel_contributions: Validation scoring each token exactly once while allowing overlapping left-context windows
Introduction of overlapping evaluation windows stepped by EVAL_STRIDE to maximize left context
Only newly exposed tail region contributes to validation loss and byte accounting, avoiding double counting
No change to training or dataset ordering, preserving no future-token leakage
Prefix loss recomputed and subtracted for clarity and correctness in validation
Improved evaluation realism by allowing maximal left context conditioning without inflating metrics
